vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of advanced degradation. The registry-defined specimens (P1-P4) are not visible as healthy, living plants. The environment is dominated by soil and debris.

inventory_reconciliation.P3 (Pothos): Systemic Loss: No foliage detected; white rabbit anchor is present but obscured by debris.

plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present, but no Pothos foliage visible.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, damp, and potentially anaerobic. No signs of active growth.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, calcified fragments (likely eggshells) in P3. Spoon present in P1/P2 vicinity.
biome_observations.lighting: Extremely low-light conditions; insufficient for photosynthesis.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: No significant change; pots appear empty.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Significant drop in ambient light levels, rendering the scene nearly black.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Static; no recovery or new growth observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. The absence of chlorophyll-bearing tissue across all pots suggests total plant mortality or complete removal of specimens. The environment is currently a 'dead' soil system.
anomalies: Presence of white, irregular debris (eggshells) in P3.
Spoon acting as a foreign object in the P1/P2 pot area.
Total lack of visible plant matter despite registry expectations.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. The biome is currently in a state of total systemic failure. Across all five time-steps, there is no evidence of the registered plants (P1-P4). The pots contain only soil and incidental debris, such as eggshells in P3 and a spoon in the vicinity of P1/P2. The lighting conditions have deteriorated significantly, further hindering any potential for recovery. The system is currently devoid of life.
